pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly targets the existing 'Yellow House' site to duplicate, and by confirming 'Yellow House' exists in the source SampleDivesV2.ssrf file downloaded by setup_subsurface.sh.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which explicitly generates a new dive site entity with the exact typo name 'Yelow House' and assigns a dive to it.

privileged_info_summary: The correct dive site name is 'Yellow House', which exists in the original Subsurface sample dive dataset. The misspelled site is 'Yelow House', which is programmatically injected into the dive log file by the setup script to test consolidation.
